case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. THEODORE C WALKER et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, THEODORE C
